items.headline: Sullivan records first multihomer game, looks to bounce back from slow May

news_items.headline: Follow live: Yoshinobu Yamamoto working on perfect...
Tarik Skubal pitches 4 2/3 innings during first Tigers start since elbow surgery, hits 99.9 mph vs. Guardians
news_items.summary: Detroit turned to Skubal for the first time since April 29, and, 38 days after his 'Skubal scope' procedure, he showed some encouraging signs.

news_items.headline: Schlittler and Co., with 'chip on their shoulders,' grind out win over Jays
Rockies select contract of Eiberson Castellano, make additional roster moves
news_items.summary: The promotion was one of a series of moves.

news_items.headline: Paul Goldschmidt's ninth-inning home run lifts Yankees to 3-1 win over Blue Jays
news_items.summary: The Yankees were stymied by Blue Jays pitching for eight innings, but Paul Goldschmidt's two-run shot in the ninth lifted New York to a 3-1 win over Toronto on Saturday afternoon.

news_items.headline: Rangers place outfielder Carter on 10-day IL
news_items.summary: The Rangers placed outfielder Evan Carter on the 10-day injured list due to an oblique strain after he left Friday's game in the fourth inning.

news_items.headline: Braves put Strider on IL with elbow inflammation
news_items.summary: The Braves placed starting pitcher Spencer Strider on the 15-day injured list on Saturday with inflammation in his right elbow.

news_items.headline: Misiorowski Ks 15 in complete-game, 1-hit gem
news_items.summary: Jacob Misiorowski struck out a career-high 15 and pitched a complete-game one-hitter to lead the Brewers to a 6-0 win over the Phillies on Friday night.

news_items.headline: Ohtani back in Dodgers' lineup after resting knee
news_items.summary: Shohei Ohtani was back in the Dodgers' lineup for Saturday's game against the White Sox, returning from a one-game absence due to knee inflammation.

news_items.headline: Astros' Alvarez hits grand slam, 2-run HR in 1st
news_items.summary: Yordan Alvarez hit a grand slam and two-run homer in the first inning for the Astros against the Royals on Friday night.

news_items.headline: Boone says Yanks don't owe Chapman an apology
news_items.summary: One day after Boston's Aroldis Chapman repeated his belief that he's owed an apology from the Yankees for the way the team treated him at the end of the 2022 season, New York manager Aaron Boone said Friday that he doesn't see a need.

news_items.headline: Mets SS Lindor (calf) could return end of June
news_items.summary: Francisco Lindor has started playing simulated games, and Mets president of baseball operations David Stearns is hopeful the shortstop can return to the team by the end of June.

news_items.headline: Cardinals 9, Twins 6: Comeback? Runs Lack
news_items.summary: After last night’s improbable comeback-within-a-comeback-within-a-comeback-within-a-comeback, there was reason to believe the Twins could do it again after erasing an early 4-0 deficit. The Cardinals, who scored two in the first on an Ivan Herrera homer, and another two in the second on RBIs from Pedro Pages and Masyn Winn, seemed intent on scheduling Connor Prielipp […]

news_items.headline: Game Discussion: Milwaukee Brewers (42-25) vs Philadelphia Phillies (37-32)
news_items.summary: Shane Drohan and Aaron Nola will face off in tonight’s matchup

news_items.headline: Shohei Ohtani blasts leadoff home run in return to Dodgers lineup
news_items.summary: What injury? Shohei Ohtani is back in the Dodgers lineup and back to hitting home runs. Take a look at the leadoff laser he hit in Chicago.

news_items.headline: Astros vs. Royals Game Discussion: 6/13/2026
news_items.summary: TONIGHT’S GAME: The Astros continue a six-game road trip with the second game of a three-game series against the Kansas City Royals tonight at Kauffman Stadium. RHP Mike Burrows will be on the mound for the Astros, opposite LHP Noah Cameron and the Royals. ABOUT BURROWS: The 26-year old RHP Mike Burrows has been the only […]

news_items.headline: Cards crack 3 HRs in 7th -- all with 2 outs! -- to rout Twins
Herrera, Walker & Jordan Power Up St. Louis Cardinals for Win over Twins
news_items.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals struck early Saturday afternoon, but the Minnesota Twins offense responded. It ended up being a back-and-forth affair in Minneapolis, but the bats of Iván Herrera, Jordan Walker and Blaze Jordan would be the difference makers. The St. Louis Cardinals offense would come out of the gate firing in the top of […]
